narrative:
Precinct Twin Twp. Gordon & Ithaca (precinct in Darke County) has 1,314 registered voters, with 44.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 50.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 5.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 44.5 percentage points.
